zh.lifeSummary: 當Aubrey fitzRichard於1158年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾斯吉普頓時，她的父親Richard fitz Eustace31歲，母親Aubrey de Lisours30歲。她與Henry Biset結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1199年2月1日享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Aubrey fitzRichard于1158年出生在英国英格兰越可爾斯吉普頓时，她的父亲Richard fitz Eustace31岁，母亲Aubrey de Lisours30岁。她与Henry Biset结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1199年2月1日享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: Aubrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French form of the Germanic name Alberic, from alb ‘elf, supernatural being’ + ric ‘power’. This was the name, according to Germanic mythology, of the king of the elves. The native Old English form, Ælfrīc, borne by a 10th-century archbishop of Canterbury, did not long survive the Conquest. Aubrey was a relatively common given name during the Middle Ages, but later fell out of favour. Its occurrence since the 19th century may in part represent a transferred use of the surname derived from the Norman given name, as well as a revival of the latter. In the United States, this is mainly used as a girl's name, perhaps under the influence of Audrey .

variants.name: Aubree
meanings: From a Norman French form of the Germanic name Alberic, from alb ‘elf, supernatural being’ + ric ‘power’. This was the name, according to Germanic mythology, of the king of the elves. The native Old English form, Ælfrīc, borne by a 10th-century archbishop of Canterbury, did not long survive the Conquest. Aubrey was a relatively common given name during the Middle Ages, but later fell out of favour. Its occurrence since the 19th century may in part represent a transferred use of the surname derived from the Norman given name, as well as a revival of the latter. In the United States, this is mainly used as a girl's name, perhaps under the influence of Audrey .

en.lifeSummary: When Aubrey fitzRichard was born in 1158, in Skipton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard fitz Eustace, was 31 and her mother, Aubrey de Lisours, was 30. She married Henry Biset. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 1 February 1199, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aubrey fitzRichard est née en 1158, à Skipton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard fitz Eustace, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Aubrey de Lisours, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Biset. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 février 1199, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Aubrey fitzRichard 1158 in Skipton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard fitz Eustace 31 und ihre Mutter Aubrey de Lisours 30. Sie hat Henry Biset geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. Februar 1199 im Alter von 41 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Aubrey fitzRichard è nata il nel 1158 nel Skipton, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Richard fitz Eustace, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Aubrey de Lisours, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Henry Biset. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 1 febbraio 1199, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Aubrey fitzRichardが1158年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアスキプトンで生まれた時，父Richard fitz Eustaceは31歳，母Aubrey de Lisoursは30歳であった。Henry Bisetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1199年2月1日に41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Aubrey fitzRichard(이)가 1158년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 스키프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard fitz Eustace(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aubrey de Lisours(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 Henry Biset(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1199년 2월 1일 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aubrey fitzRichard nasceu em 1158, em Skipton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard fitz Eustace, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Aubrey de Lisours, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Biset. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de fevereiro de 1199, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aubrey fitzRichard родилась в 1158 г. в местности скиптон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard fitz Eustace было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Aubrey de Lisours, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Biset. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 1 февраля 1199 г. в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Aubrey fitzRichard nació en 1158, en Skipton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard fitz Eustace, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Aubrey de Lisours, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Henry Biset. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 1 de febrero de 1199, a la edad de 41 años.
